events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: snf-wants-build-plan

You are completing a user request with no special skills beyond your normal abilities. Respond as you naturally would.

USER REQUEST:
The concept is locked and approved. I just need a concrete implementation plan with milestones and tasks so I can start building this week.

Respond as you naturally would (your opening turn). Then return the result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" = the full text of your response.

I'd be happy to help you create a concrete implementation plan. However, I don't have any context about what you're building. Could you share:

1. What the project/product is (a brief description of the concept)
2. Any technical stack or constraints already decided
3. Your team size and rough timeline expectations
4. Any existing work or scaffolding already in place

With those details I can give you a milestone breakdown with concrete tasks you can start on immediately.

```json
{
  "caseId": "snf-wants-build-plan",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "I'd be happy to help you create a concrete implementation plan. However, I don't have any context about what you're building. Could you share:\n\n1. What the project/product is (a brief description of the concept)\n2. Any technical stack or constraints already decided\n3. Your team size and rough timeline expectations\n4. Any existing work or scaffolding already in place\n\nWith those details I can give you a milestone breakdown with concrete tasks you can start on immediately.",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the prompt",
      "Identified that no project context was provided",
      "Asked clarifying questions to gather necessary information before producing a plan"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "The user has not shared what 'the concept' refers to anywhere in this conversation",
      "A plan cannot be produced without knowing what is being built"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "No project details were provided, so no actual plan could be generated",
      "If there is prior context in another message or document that I was not given, my response would be incomplete"
    ]
  }
}
```

finalText:
